Tạo skill MỚI HOÀN TOÀN `quality-gate-orchestration`. Load: skill-creator, skill-judge, skill-development, writing-skills.

## Type: META-CONCEPT — cần références/terminology-map.md + références/philosophy.md

Gate concepts khác giữa GSD (review/verify/validate gates), Hivemind (lifecycle→spec→evidence triad).

## Đọc tham khảo (KHÔNG copy)
- `.opencode/skills/hm-l2-gate-orchestrator/SKILL.md` (HEALTHY — 221 lines, tham khảo pattern)
- `.planning/phases/23-notification-fix-and-tool-surface-docs/23-W2-SYNTHESIS.md`
- `.opencode/skills/gate-l3-lifecycle-integration/SKILL.md` — gate lifecycle pattern
- `.opencode/skills/gate-l3-spec-compliance/SKILL.md` — spec compliance gate
- `.opencode/skills/gate-l3-evidence-truth/SKILL.md` — evidence truth gate

## Mục tiêu: `.opencode/skills/quality-gate-orchestration/SKILL.md`

- Gate triad order: lifecycle → spec → evidence (fixed sequence)
- Khi nào chạy từng gate, khi nào skip
- PASS/FAIL routing: PASS → gate tiếp, FAIL → remediation route
- Evidence hierarchy: L1 (runtime) → L5 (docs)
- Gate decision matrix + trigger phrases
- Framework-agnostic (KO hm-/hf-/gsd- prefix)

**Scope boundary:** KO dạy coordination (scope của multi-agent-coordination). KO dạy completion detection (scope của completion-detection).

## Output
- SKILL.md (<300 lines)
- `references/terminology-map.md` — gate concepts across frameworks
- `references/philosophy.md` — why triad order matters, why evidence hierarchy

Commit. `## SKILL quality-gate-orchestration COMPLETE`.
